title: 电商场景生活方式图
prompt_template: A lifestyle scene showing {product_name} in use by a {target_user_description} in a {setting_description} environment. Authentic candid moment (not overly posed), natural daylight from a nearby window, shallow depth of field with focus on the product, color palette matching the product's brand identity ({brand_color_palette}), modern editorial commercial photography style, sense of story and aspiration, 1024x1024.
